description: Adds Mermaid diagram support to built-in chats, Markdown previews, and notebooks.
command.resetPanZoom.title: Reset Pan and Zoom
command.openInEditor.title: Open Diagram in Editor
command.copySource.title: Copy Diagram Source
config.title: Mermaid
config.markdown-mermaid.lightModeTheme.d: Default Mermaid theme for light mode.
config.markdown-mermaid.darkModeTheme.de: Default Mermaid theme for dark mode.
config.markdown-mermaid.theme.vscode.des: Mermaid theme derived from the current VS Code color theme.
config.markdown-mermaid.theme.base.descr: Built-in Mermaid theme. The only Mermaid theme that can be customized with theme variables.
config.markdown-mermaid.theme.forest.des: Built-in Mermaid theme using shades of green.
config.markdown-mermaid.theme.dark.descr: Built-in Mermaid theme for dark backgrounds.
config.markdown-mermaid.theme.default.de: The default built-in Mermaid theme. Works well with light backgrounds.
config.markdown-mermaid.theme.neutral.de: Built-in Mermaid theme using a neutral grayscale palette. Suitable for black and white prints.
config.markdown-mermaid.maxTextSize.desc: The maximum allowed size of the user's text diagram.
Controls when mouse-based navigation is enabled on Mermaid diagrams.
Always enable mouse navigation on Mermaid diagrams.
Only enable mouse navigation when holding down Alt (Option on macOS). Gestures such as pinch-to-zoom will still work without Alt.
config.markdown-mermaid.controls.show.de: Controls showing UI controls on Mermaid diagrams.
config.markdown-mermaid.controls.show.on: Show zoom controls when hovering over or focusing a diagram.
config.markdown-mermaid.resizable.descri: Allow diagrams to be resized vertically by dragging the bottom edge.
config.markdown-mermaid.maxHeight.markdo: Maximum height for diagrams. Must be a CSS value with units such as `80vh` or `400px`. Leave empty to try to automatically size diagrams based on their content.
